title: Phones Mod
description:
Welcome at Phones Mod!
This mod adds Phones to game. It's ideal to decoration.

1.0.0 got released!
body:
Hi! This is the Phones mod! 

**Thank you for the 2000 downloads! :D**

-----------------------
The 1.0.2 H1 is broken. These are the things that are now broken:
- You cannot craft the Pink Phone, the recipe for the Pink Phone is somehow applied to the Gold Phone.
- The Violet and Magenta recipes are swapped
- The ??? block is impossible to get in Survival
- Some text is written incorrectly.                                                                          
The next update (1.0.3) will repair it.
-----------------------
The 1.0.3 version is delayed. I don't have so much time to make a new version, but i think it will come in xx.04-05.2026
------------------------

Versions 0.0.1, 0.0.2 and 1.0.0 DO NOT HAVE RECIPES.
Versions 0.0.3 and newer (excl. 1.0.0) HAVE recipes.
This mod offers:
Red phone,
Orange phone,
Yellow phone, 
Green phone,
Light blue phone,
Purple phone,
Pink phone, 
Gold phone (It's epic and it's immune to fire.)
[this list is deprecated.]

------------------------
Check out my new resource pack!
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/scr-logos
------------------------

1.0.3 will add packages!

![THE C0RRUPT3D STRUCTUR3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8657476c7c68119cb44ad4da2e023c691394fb33.png)
P.S. my pc is not a potato
